items.raw_excerpt: Karls Erlebnis-Dörfer und der niederländische Hersteller Vekoma haben auf der IAAPA Expo Europe bekanntgegeben, dass im Sommer 2026 zwei maßgeschneiderte
items.summary_en: Karls Erlebnis-Dörfer and Dutch maker Vekoma announced two custom roller coasters at IAAPA Expo Europe. The rides are planned for summer 2026.
items.summary_ko: Karls Erlebnis-Dörfer와 네덜란드 제조사 Vekoma가 IAAPA Expo Europe에서 맞춤형 롤러코스터 두 대를 발표했다. 새 놀이기구는 2026년 여름에 선보일 예정이다.
items.title_en: Karls Erlebnis-Dorf Plans Two New Roller Coasters

items.raw_excerpt: WienTourismus hat die Bewohner:innen des schottischen Dorfs Dull eingeladen, um im ruhigsten Monat des Jahres zu prüfen, ob die Stadt tatsächlich langweilig ist - und erhält ein klares Urteil.
items.summary_en: Vienna Tourism invited people from Dull, a small Scottish village, to visit during the quietest month of the year. They were asked to judge whether the city is really boring, and they gave a clear verdict.
items.summary_ko: 빈 관광청은 한 해 중 가장 조용한 달에 스코틀랜드의 작은 마을 덜 주민들을 초대했다. 빈이 정말 지루한 도시인지 판단해 달라는 취지였고, 주민들은 분명한 평가를 내렸다.
items.title_en: Vienna Asks Dull Village to Judge Its Boring Image
items.title_ko: 빈, 스코틀랜드 덜 마을에 지루한 도시인지 물었다
items.title_original: Langeweile-Klischee: Wien lässt das schottische Dorf Dull entscheiden, wie "dull" die Stadt ist - Horizont

items.raw_excerpt: The iconic pine on Mäkrävaara hill in Koli National Park has died.
items.summary_en: A well-known pine tree on Mäkrävaara hill in Koli National Park has died. The tree was an iconic local landmark in eastern Finland.
items.summary_ko: 콜리 국립공원 매크래바라 언덕의 유명한 소나무가 죽었습니다. 이 나무는 핀란드 동부의 상징적인 지역 명소였습니다.

items.title_ko: 핀란드의 가장 유명한 소나무가 죽다

items.raw_excerpt: Helsingin ja Vantaan rajalle aukeaa tänään perjantaina uusi ostoskylä Helsinki Outlet.
items.summary_en: A new outlet village called Helsinki Outlet opens today on the border of Helsinki and Vantaa. It has dozens of shops, and the article says everything there is always on sale.
items.summary_ko: 헬싱키와 반타의 경계에 새 아웃렛 마을인 헬싱키 아웃렛이 오늘 문을 엽니다. 수십 개 매장이 들어서며, 기사에 따르면 이곳의 모든 상품은 항상 할인 판매됩니다.

items.raw_excerpt: Austria’s long school summer break is nearly here, and for many families it raises the same question every year: how do you cover weeks of childcare when working life doesn’t pause with the school calendar?
items.summary_en: Austria's long school summer break is almost here. Many working parents need to find childcare for several weeks while their jobs continue.
items.summary_ko: 오스트리아의 긴 학교 여름방학이 곧 시작된다. 많은 맞벌이 부모들은 일이 계속되는 동안 몇 주간의 아이 돌봄을 어떻게 해결할지 고민하고 있다.
items.title_en: Austrian parents face long summer childcare gap

items.title_original: TELL US: How do working parents in Austria cover the long summer holidays?

items.raw_excerpt: Lokayukta hearings in Bidar start tomorrow; only pending complaints will be addressed from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m.
items.summary_en: Lokayukta complaint hearings will start in Bidar tomorrow. Only pending complaints will be heard from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m.

items.summary_en: Albalat dels Sorells will host a special youth event on June 27. The town plans a six-hour zombie survival night, organized by the local youth office with WRG World Real G.

items.summary_en: Nippon Access opened an all-you-can-eat frozen food and ice cream event in Sapporo. About 200 items are served at Sapporo Factory Hall from November 28 to December 15.

items.raw_excerpt: Stormy weather is bearing down on Toronto just as the city prepares to host its secod game of FIFA World Cup 2026.
items.summary_en: Stormy weather is moving toward Toronto as the city prepares for its second FIFA World Cup 2026 game. Heavy rain and thunderstorms could affect soccer fans going to the match.
items.summary_ko: 토론토가 2026 FIFA 월드컵 두 번째 경기를 준비하는 가운데 폭풍우가 다가오고 있다. 강한 비와 천둥번개가 경기장을 찾는 축구 팬들에게 영향을 줄 수 있다.

items.raw_excerpt: Bei jüngsten Bohrungen in seiner Lagerstätte im Vogtland stößt die Freiberger Saxore Bergbau GmbH auf deutlich mehr Zinn als zuletzt erwartet. Und auf ein Metall, das bislang fast nur aus China kommt.
items.summary_en: A mining company found more tin than expected during recent drilling in Vogtland, Saxony. It also found another metal that has mostly come from China so far. The valuable deposit lies under a local village, but it is not clear when it will be mined.
items.summary_ko: 작센주 포크틀란트에서 최근 시추를 하던 광산 회사가 예상보다 많은 주석을 확인했다. 지금까지 주로 중국에서 들여오던 또 다른 금속도 함께 발견됐다. 이 귀한 광물층은 한 마을 아래에 있지만, 언제 채굴될지는 아직 분명하지 않다.
items.title_en: Large tin find under a Vogtland village
items.title_ko: 포크틀란트 마을 아래서 큰 주석 매장 확인

items.summary_en: Abu Town in Yamaguchi Prefecture has drawn attention because of a mistaken money transfer and the hard task of getting it back. The small town faces the Sea of Japan. As of April, it had 2,952 residents, 1,528 households, and 463 households exempt from resident tax.
items.summary_ko: 야마구치현 아부정은 오송금과 회수의 어려움으로 주목을 받고 있다. 이곳은 일본해에 접한 작은 마을이다. 4월 기준 인구는 2,952명, 세대 수는 1,528세대이며 주민세 비과세 세대는 463세대다.

items.raw_excerpt: The more-than-36-acre property in Pittston, named Tut Hill by its creator, contains 21 structures.
items.summary_en: A more than 36-acre property in Pittston, Maine, is back on the market for $6 million. The private village, called Tut Hill by its creator, has 21 buildings.
items.summary_ko: 메인주 피츠턴에 있는 36에이커 넘는 부지가 600만 달러에 다시 매물로 나왔다. 만든 사람이 튯 힐이라고 이름 붙인 이 사유 마을에는 건물 21채가 있다.

items.raw_excerpt: En el centro de la nueva apuesta cultural de la Generalitat Valenciana (la única gran institución con incremento de presupuesto), el museo busca su sitio
items.summary_en: The Bellas Artes museum in Valencia wants to become Spain's true second major art gallery. It is part of a new cultural push by the Valencian regional government, whose culture budget is rising.
items.summary_ko: 발렌시아의 벨라스 아르테스 미술관이 스페인의 진정한 두 번째 주요 미술관이 되려 하고 있다. 이는 문화 예산을 늘린 발렌시아 주정부의 새 문화 정책 흐름 속에서 추진되고 있다.

items.raw_excerpt: Très imprégnée par son histoire avec le Premier et le Second Empire, Thonon-les-Bains jouit du statut de « ville impériale ».
items.summary_en: Thonon-les-Bains is known as an imperial town. Its history is closely linked to the First and Second French Empires.

items.raw_excerpt: Archaeologists have uncovered the largest Roman bathhouse complex ever found in the Netherlands, during excavations in the Waalfront district of Nijmegen. The dig, carried out by the archaeology firms RAAP and BAAC on a former industrial site, also turned up housing blocks, streets, luxury townhouses, a tower and tens of thousands of objects, Nijmegen council said. The baths stood in Ulpia Noviomagus, the Roman city on the site of present-day Nijmegen. The site is at least 4,900 square metres –.
items.summary_en: Archaeologists found the largest Roman bathhouse complex ever discovered in the Netherlands. The site in Nijmegen also included streets, homes, a tower, and tens of thousands of objects.
items.summary_ko: 고고학자들이 네덜란드에서 지금까지 발견된 것 중 가장 큰 로마 시대 목욕탕 유적을 찾았습니다. 네이메헌의 이 유적에서는 거리, 주거지, 탑, 수만 점의 유물도 함께 나왔습니다.
items.title_en: Roman Bathhouse Found in Nijmegen
items.title_ko: 네이메헌에서 로마 목욕탕 유적 발견
items.title_original: Archaeologists uncover the Netherlands’ largest Roman bathhouse

items.raw_excerpt: Step into fairy-tale Netherlands with storybook towns, canals, windmills, cobbled streets, and timeless charm around every corner.
items.summary_en: WorldAtlas highlights eight small towns in the Netherlands with a storybook feel. The towns are described as having canals, windmills, cobbled streets, and old charm.

items.raw_excerpt: Juuri kukaan ei tajua pysähtyä tässä pittoreskissa saaristokylässä. Jos haluaa väistää supersuositun Saariston rengastien ruuhkan, kannattaa suunnata Askaisiin.
items.summary_en: Askainen is a small, pretty village in the Turku archipelago. The article says visitors can use a sauna and stay there for free. It is suggested as a quieter stop away from the busy Archipelago Trail.
items.summary_ko: 투르쿠 군도에 있는 작은 마을 아스카이넨을 소개한 기사다. 방문객은 이곳에서 무료로 사우나를 이용하고 머물 수 있다고 한다. 붐비는 군도 순환도로를 피하고 싶은 사람에게 조용한 대안으로 제안된다.

items.summary_en: A rural school project uses nature and traditional knowledge in its lessons. An initiative that honors environmental education is taking applications until June 29.

items.raw_excerpt: Germany is home to countless beautiful villages. Here are eight of The Local's recommendations for some of the most charming ones to visit this summer for a day trip or as part of a longer tour.
items.summary_en: The Local Germany shared eight charming villages to visit in Germany this summer. The list is meant for day trips or longer travel plans.
